productDisplayName: ADIDAS Neo Men Court Evo Blue Shoes
description: The Court Evo from adidas is a lifestyle shoe - a modern, lightweight reinterpretation of the humble sneaker. Crafted from the highest quality materials, the upper features stylish, understated perforation details on the classic 3-Stipes, an adidas twist that makes this shoe top our wish-list for the season! men, class up your casual act with this stylish sneaker. Recommended for casual wear; looks best when worn with a tonal, monochrome tee! Upper Synthetic upper with stitch detail at the seams of the toe box and fabric inlays Adidas 3-Stripe embossing at the midfoot region with perforated details on it Padded fabric inner Reinforced overlay at the heel collar Central lace-ups Padded tongue with branding Midsole Rubber midsole Outsole TPU outsole with patterned grooves and a suction point (with concentric circle grooves) at the big toe region in the outsole Shoe care Wipe surface with a clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
